reviewer_stances.reason: Substantive and specific; the meta-review adopts this reviewer's exact strength language ("technically coherent and empirically well supported"), and the presentation critique (long abstract, blurred Sections 3.1-3.2, underspecified Section 3.3, unhighlighted Eqns 12-14, unproven global-receptive-field claim) is concrete and actionable, despite low self-confidence and being outside the reviewer's main area.

Highest self-confidence and most specific review; multiple points are echoed verbatim by the meta-review ("excellent appendices," "sensible experiments," experiments' range and complexity not the strongest part). Identifies the key missing comparison to FNO/spectral NPs and to sub-quadratic attention variants.

Largely checkbox ("Yes, as far as I can assess"), self-declared outside core expertise with low confidence, but contributes a few constructive and corroborating points (add coverage/CRPS metrics and a GP baseline, weaknesses not discussed) that align with the broader 'broaden the evaluation' theme.

Specific and high-confidence; its framing of the two motivating limitations (interpretability, scalability) matches the meta-review's "well motivated and technically developed," and it raises concrete, evaluation-relevant weaknesses (linear-attention baselines, missing qualitative figures) and good clarifying questions (|Ξ| capacity scaling, length-scale sensitivity, first-order Volterra correspondence).

score_rationale: The three high-weight reviewers (LfFw, TVDt, iyk8) converge on a well-motivated, technically sound paper whose experiments are the weakest aspect, and the meta-review adopts their language almost verbatim ("technically coherent," "empirically well supported," "excellent appendices," "sensible experiments," experiments' range not the strongest part); soundness and significance are therefore set at the shared 3, and overall recommendation at the unanimous 5 that matches the accept decision. Presentation is placed at 3 as a weighted middle between LfFw's specific main-text critique (2) and the praise of TVDt/ojnn (4) and iyk8 (3), since the paper is generally clear but under-organizes its main-text contributions. Originality is set to 3, balancing LfFw's "novelty is in the combination" (2) against iyk8/ojnn (4), reflecting a meaningful synthesis rather than an entirely new primitive. Confidence is 4 because the evidence is highly coherent and mutually corroborating, anchored by the two high-confidence reviewers; ojnn is down-weighted to medium for being largely checkbox and outside its expertise.
